fresh_facts.claim: The US deployed a third aircraft carrier strike group including USS George HW Bush to the Middle East on April 21-22, 2026, described as the largest naval buildup since the Iraq War.
The US deployed thousands of troops alongside the aircraft carrier strike group to the Middle East in April 2026.
Advanced GARC drones were deployed to monitor IRGC fast boats around the Strait of Hormuz on April 22, 2026.
President Trump rejected further ceasefire extensions with Iran and warned of potential assaults if talks fail as of April 22, 2026.
Iran unveiled the Korumshar 4 missile with a 2,000 km range and GA Michelle missile on April 22, 2026.
An IRGC-linked video from April 19, 2026 showed underground missile and drone launchers under reconstruction with forces at 70% pre-war strength.
IRGC Commander Esmail Qaani visited Baghdad days before April 22, 2026 to meet militia leaders.
Iran branded the US blockade an 'act of war' on April 21, 2026.
IRGC Aerospace Force Commander S. Majid Mousavi highlighted missile replenishment capabilities as of April 22, 2026.
The US halted $500 million in dollar shipments to Iraq and froze security ties to curb Iran-backed militias as of April 22, 2026.
Iran's Revolutionary Guards seized two cargo ships in the Strait of Hormuz on April 22, 2026, hours after the US ceasefire extension announcement.
President Trump extended a ceasefire with Iran that was announced on April 21-22, 2026.
On April 18, 2026, Iran's deputy Foreign Minister Saeed Khatibzadeh stated no date is set for further US talks until a 'framework' is agreed.
On April 18, 2026, Iran fired on a tanker and reimposed a blockade in the Hormuz area, reversing a reopening initiative.
Mounting opposition exists in Tehran to negotiations with the US as of late April 2026, casting doubt on new talks in Islamabad.
Experts assessed Iran's economy as likely to buckle faster than the US or global economy under war, sanctions, US blockade, and Hormuz disruptions.
According to ISW indicators updated February 3, 2026, senior Iranian officials met with Chinese and Russian representatives, including LEC Commander Radan with the PRC ambassador.
According to ISW indicators updated February 3, 2026, arrests of security forces refusing to fire on protesters were recorded as signs of regime instability.
Iran conducted prior waves of protests described by ISW as the most serious unrest ever, suppressed via brutal crackdown, internet blackouts, and foreign militia deployments.
Khamenei reportedly ordered a 'shoot to kill' crackdown on January 9, 2026.

regime_fall.current_status: Iran faces an acute multi-front crisis as the April 22 ceasefire expires with the US deploying a third carrier strike group and 10,000+ troops, while Tehran simultaneously confronts internal instability marked by protest crackdowns, security force defections, and accelerating economic collapse from sanctions and Hormuz blockade pressures. Tehran has responded with advanced missile unveilings, cargo ship seizures, and explicit rejection of diplomatic frameworks, signaling imminent military escalation.
regime_fall.last_major_event: On April 22, 2026, the US deployed a third aircraft carrier strike group (USS George HW Bush) with 10,000+ additional troops while Iran's Revolutionary Guards seized two cargo ships in the Strait of Hormuz hours later, marking the ceasefire's collapse and escalation into direct confrontation.
